positive: A detailed, stylized illustration of a friendly, magical woodland creature, like a glowing fox or a gentle forest spirit, surrounded by whimsical, bioluminescent flora and elements. The composition should be centered, utilizing a dynamic, circular arrangement of natural elements. The style must be highly graphic, clean vector-art inspired, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on strong, deep silhouettes and high contrast between the subject and the background. Color palette suggestions include deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, glowing teal, and warm autumnal golds. Use geometric patterns subtly integrated into the foliage and background for texture. The overall mood should be enchanting and joyful. --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, blurry, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, dirty, sketch, photo, realism, grayscale
